message:
test: seed proptest_jsonl_roundtrip regression shrinkage

Checks in the shrunk seed that proptest surfaced while exercising the
new tests/proptest_jsonl_roundtrip.rs suite (landed in c83bd4e).

Follows the convention documented at the top of every
.proptest-regressions file: "It is recommended to check this file in
to source control so that everyone who runs the test benefits from
these saved cases." Having the seed in the repo guarantees that
future runs replay this particular shrink first so any regression in
JSONL round-trip / content_hash stability is caught with one cheap
pre-canned case instead of re-searching for it from scratch.

The recorded shape: a pair of bd-000a0a0a-style issues with a single
1-char label, one comment, and a Blocks dependency linking them —
exactly the minimal adversarial case the shrinker converged on for
the round-trip + hash-stability property.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc e78a99e8768a77c556218b0223cca5b29a742e500a0b9e7868fa3af44b51dd41 # shrinks to case = RoundTripCase { source: Issue { id: "bd-000a0a0a", content_hash: None, title: "a", description: None, design: None, acceptance_criteria: None, notes: None, status: Open, priority: Priority(0), issue_type: Task, assignee: None, owner: None, estimated_minutes: None, created_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z, created_by: None, updated_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z, closed_at: None, close_reason: None, closed_by_session: None, due_at: None, defer_until: None, external_ref: None, source_system: None, source_repo: Some("."), deleted_at: None, deleted_by: None, delete_reason: None, original_type: None, compaction_level: None, compacted_at: None, compacted_at_commit: None, original_size: None, sender: None, ephemeral: false, pinned: false, is_template: false, labels: [], dependencies: [], comments: [] }, blocker: Issue { id: "bd-target000a0a0a", content_hash: None, title: "Blocker 000a0a0a", description: None, design: None, acceptance_criteria: None, notes: None, status: Open, priority: Priority(3), issue_type: Task, assignee: None, owner: None, estimated_minutes: None, created_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z, created_by: Some("proptest"), updated_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z, closed_at: None, close_reason: None, closed_by_session: None, due_at: None, defer_until: None, external_ref: None, source_system: None, source_repo: Some("."), deleted_at: None, deleted_by: None, delete_reason: None, original_type: None, compaction_level: None, compacted_at: None, compacted_at_commit: None, original_size: None, sender: None, ephemeral: false, pinned: false, is_template: false, labels: [], dependencies: [], comments: [] }, labels: ["a", "a_"], comments: [Comment { id: 1, issue_id: "bd-000a0a0a", author: "t_--1v9_2-_", body: "AW?BM?0X_I", created_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:01Z }], dependency: Dependency { issue_id: "bd-000a0a0a", depends_on_id: "bd-target000a0a0a", dep_type: Blocks, created_at: 2026-01-01T00:00:02Z, created_by: Some("proptest"), metadata: Some("{}"), thread_id: Some("roundtrip") } }
